---
title: "Mathematical Statistics: Inference, Estimation, and Testing"
subtitle: "CORE-008 | Core Mathematics — Year 1"
description: "The rigorous theory of statistical inference. Provides the mathematical foundations for every data-facing component of the curriculum: parameter estimation, hypothesis testing, model selection, and the asymptotic theory that justifies practical methods."
date: "2026-04-11"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
number-sections: true
---

# Mathematical Statistics: Inference, Estimation, and Testing

*Content not yet generated.*

Run the generation pipeline and then `src/quarto_export.jl` to populate this page.
